pi_items.source: Live test: file created by setup_task.sh and verified readable via cat. Contains 5 sections (A-E) with all task instructions.

Live DB query: SELECT name FROM manager_routine WHERE id=4 returns 'Hypertrophy Block A'. Export JSON confirms original_name_found=true. Screenshot 04_routine_detail_top.png shows this name in the wger UI.

This is the TARGET name (not present in initial state). Confirmed not present via export JSON new_name_found=false. Companion document Section C instructs: 'Rename the routine to Strength-Power Phase B'.

Live DB query shows plan ID=3 with description='Maintenance Phase', goals energy=2800, protein=160, carbs=340, fat=85. Export JSON confirms found=true. Screenshot 06_nutrition_plan.png shows plan in wger UI with 3 meals.
This is the TARGET plan name (not present in initial state). Export JSON confirms competition.found=false. Companion document Section E instructs agent to create it.
Live DB query: weight_weightentry for 2026-01-12 shows weight=87.40. Export JSON: '2026-01-12': 87.4. Total 12 weight entries confirmed.
DB evidence: weight_weightentry row for date 2026-01-11 23:00:00+00 (UTC, equivalent to 2026-01-12 local) shows weight=87.40. Export JSON confirms 87.4.

Companion document Section A: 'Entry dated 2026-01-12 currently reads 87.4 kg. Correct value: 87.3 kg (transcription rounding error from digital scale readout 87.32)'. The 0.1 kg correction is consistent with a transcription rounding error.
Live DB: weight_weightentry for 2026-03-15 23:00:00+00 (UTC, local 2026-03-16) shows weight=186.40. Export JSON: '2026-03-16': 186.4.
DB evidence and export JSON both confirm weight=186.40 for this date. Value is clearly an outlier (other entries range 84.9-88.2 kg).

Companion document states 'Correct value: 84.6 kg'. Independent calculation: 186.4 lbs / 2.20462 = 84.55 kg, which rounds to 84.6 with standard rounding. The document provides 84.6 as the definitive value.

Category 'Body Fat Percentage' (unit: %) exists in DB (id=4) with 4 existing entries: 18.2, 17.8, 17.5, 17.1. New value 16.8 continues the declining trend. Companion document Section B specifies 16.8%.
Category 'Chest Circumference' (unit: cm) exists in DB (id=5) with 4 entries: 101.5, 101.8, 102.0, 102.3. New value 102.8 continues increasing trend. Companion document Section B specifies 102.8 cm.
Category 'Waist Circumference' (unit: cm) exists in DB (id=6) with 4 entries: 84.0, 83.5, 83.2, 82.8. New value 82.3 continues decreasing trend. Companion document Section B specifies 82.3 cm.
Independent calculation: 2.2 g/kg * 84.6 kg = 186.12 -> round to 186 g. Matches companion document Section D.
Independent calculation: 4.5 g/kg * 84.6 kg = 380.70 -> round to 381 g. Matches companion document Section D.
Independent calculation: 1.0 g/kg * 84.6 kg = 84.6 -> round to 85 g. Note: this equals the initial fat goal (also 85), so the fat value is unchanged after the update. Matches companion document.
Independent calculation: (186*4) + (381*4) + (85*9) = 744 + 1524 + 765 = 3033 kcal. Matches companion document Section D.

Companion document Section E specifies Energy = 2400 kcal. Note: macro sum is (200*4)+(220*4)+(70*9) = 2310 kcal, which differs from 2400 because wger's energy goal is an independent field, not computed from macros. This is standard practice in nutrition planning.
Companion document Section E specifies Protein = 200 g.
Companion document Section E specifies Carbs = 220 g.
Companion document Section E specifies Fat = 70 g.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying an existing wger fitness manager installation. INITIAL STATE: 12 weight entries exist (dates 2025-12-29 through 2026-03-16, values 84.9-88.2 kg except one erroneous entry of 186.4 kg on 2026-03-16). Routine 'Hypertrophy Block A' (ID=4) has 4 training days: 'Upper Push' (Bench Press 4x8, Overhead Press 3x10, Barbell Triceps Extension 3x12), 'Lower Body' (Barbell Squat 4x8, Leg Extension 3x12, Standing Calf Raises 3x15), 'Upper Pull' (Bent Over Barbell Row 4x8, Alternating bicep curls 3x12, Dumbbell Lateral Raise 3x15), 'Full Body' (Barbell Romanian Deadlift RDL 3x5, Military Press mit SZ-Bar 3x10, Lunges 3x12). Note that exercise names in the UI may differ from common names (e.g., 'Barbell Triceps Extension' not 'Triceps Extension', 'Alternating bicep curls' not 'Bicep Curls'). Nutrition plan 'Maintenance Phase' (ID=3) has initial goals: 2800 kcal, 160g protein, 340g carbs, 85g fat, with 3 meals: Breakfast (Rolled Oats 80g, Whole Milk 250g, Whey Protein Powder 30g), Lunch (Chicken Breast Raw 200g, Brown Rice Cooked 150g, Broccoli Raw 100g), Dinner (Beef Steak Raw 250g, Sweet Potato Raw 200g). Three measurement categories exist with 4 entries each: 'Body Fat Percentage' (%), 'Chest Circumference' (cm), 'Waist Circumference' (cm). EXPECTED CHANGES: (1) Weight entry on 2026-01-12 changed from 87.4 to 87.3 kg; (2) Weight entry on 2026-03-16 changed from 186.4 to 84.6 kg; (3) New measurement entries added: Body Fat 16.8%, Chest 102.8 cm, Waist 82.3 cm; (4) Routine renamed to 'Strength-Power Phase B'; (5) 'Full Body' day deleted; (6) In 'Upper Push': Overhead Press removed, Incline Dumbbell Press 3x10 added; (7) In 'Lower Body': Romanian Deadlift 3x10 added; (8) New day 'Explosive Power' on Wednesday with Pull-ups 4x6, Power Clean 5x3, Kettlebell Swing 3x15; (9) Nutrition plan 'Maintenance Phase' goals updated to 3033 kcal, 186g protein, 381g carbs, 85g fat; (10) 'Dinner' meal removed; (11) 'Post-Workout Recovery' meal added with Whey Protein Powder 40g and Banana 120g; (12) New plan 'Competition Peak Nutrition' created with goals 2400 kcal, 200g protein, 220g carbs, 70g fat and 3 meals: 'Pre-Weigh-In Breakfast', 'Post-Weigh-In Recovery', 'Pre-Competition Fuel'. DATA QUIRKS: The fat goal (85g) happens to be the same before and after update. Weight dates in PostgreSQL are stored as UTC (e.g., 2026-01-11 23:00:00+00 for local date 2026-01-12). The wger UI may display exercises with longer names than expected from common usage. Exercises for search exist in DB: Incline Dumbbell Press (id=1286), Romanian Deadlift (id=507), Pull-ups (created by setup), Power Clean (id=683), Kettlebell Swing (id=960). Ingredients for search: 'Whey Protein Powder' (id=4), 'Banana, raw' (id=1).
